title: Using AI for Plugin Development
description: Learn how to use AI tools like ChatGPT responsibly to help you code, debug, and learn faster without becoming dependent.

lessons.title: Why Use AI?
lessons.content:
# Why Use AI?

AI can help you:
- Fix errors
- Understand code
- Learn faster
- Get unstuck

## Example
If your plugin crashes, you can paste the error into AI and ask:
"What does this error mean?"

## Logic
- You try first
- If stuck → use AI
- Learn from the answer

## Rule
AI is a TOOL, not a replacement for thinking.

quiz.question: What is AI best used for?

lessons.title: Popular AI Tools
lessons.content:
# AI Tools You Can Use

## ChatGPT
- Great for explanations
- Helps fix bugs

## Google AI Studio
- Good for experimenting
- Can test prompts

## Others
- GitHub Copilot
- Claude

## Logic
Different tools = different strengths

## Tip
Try multiple tools if one doesn’t help.

quiz.question: What should you do if one AI fails?

lessons.title: How to Ask AI Properly
lessons.content:
# Writing Good Prompts

## Bad Prompt
"Fix my code"

## Good Prompt
"My Minecraft plugin gives a NullPointerException when breaking a block. Here is my code: ..."

## Logic
- More detail = better answer

## Include
- Error message
- Code
- What you expected

## Tip
Be specific.

lessons.title: Don’t Overuse AI
lessons.content:
# Avoid Overusing AI

## Problem
If you rely on AI too much:
- You won’t learn
- You’ll get stuck without it

## Bad Habit
Copy-pasting code without understanding

## Good Habit
- Read the code
- Ask why it works
- Modify it yourself

## Rule
If you don’t understand it → don’t use it yet.

quiz.question: What happens if you overuse AI?

lessons.title: Real Example: Fixing a Bug
lessons.content:
# Example

## Problem
Command crashes with error

## Step 1
Copy error

## Step 2
Ask AI:
"Why am I getting this error?"

## Step 3
Read response

## Step 4
Fix code and test

## Logic
- AI helps
- You learn

## Important
Always test after using AI.

lessons.title: Best Practices
lessons.content:
# Best Practices

- Try yourself first
- Use AI when stuck
- Understand everything
- Never blindly copy
- Test everything

## Golden Rule
AI should HELP you think, not replace thinking.
